title: Every Forgotten Cry

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Through shadows deep, the heavens cry,
A hymn for hearts where silence lies.
We faltered where the light grew dim,
In deserts wide, with hearts worn thin.
Forgot the hand that parted seas,
The mercy flowing, setting free.
Yet grace endures through every storm,
A beacon bright, in darkness formed.
Oh, how He saves, though we forget,
His love remains, our sun won’t set.
In every fall, He lifts the name,
A boundless hope, through every flame.
We wept by rivers torn by sin,
Yet still His arms draw us within.
A tapestry of broken ways,
He weaves with light to endless praise.
Let the mountains rise, let the valleys bow,
For mercy reigns here and now.
In the hollowed winds, let the Spirit sing,
A song of love eternal spring.
Oh, how He saves, though we forget,
His love remains, our sun won’t set.
In every fall, He lifts the name,
A boundless hope, through every flame.
Through every cry, a whisper true,
His grace eternal, breaking through.

epigraph: for his mercy endureth for ever
styleNote: Anthemic With Soaring Harmonies · Full Orchestration · Vocal Layering Intensifies
